footer.tagline: Empowering people with disabilities to find meaningful careers through AI-driven matching and accessibility-first design.
footer.copyright: © {year} InclusiveHire. Built with accessibility at its core.

index.heroDescription: InclusiveHire connects talented individuals with disabilities to inclusive employers through AI-driven matching, accessible design, and personalized accommodations.
index.candidatePortalDesc: Accessible registration, disability-aware profiles, CV upload with OCR, and AI-powered job recommendations.
index.employerPortalDesc: Post jobs with physical requirements, get AI compatibility scores, and access a matched candidate dashboard.
index.aiMatchingDesc: Ability-based logic with 0-100% compatibility scores and personalized accommodation suggestions.
index.cvAnalyzerDesc: Tesseract/Google Vision OCR and NLP skill extraction to build comprehensive profiles automatically.
index.speechApisDesc: Text-to-Speech for blind support and Speech-to-Text for deaf support, fully integrated across the platform.
index.accessibilityFirstDesc: High contrast mode, ARIA labels, keyboard & voice navigation, video subtitles built into every feature.
index.step1Desc: Register with accessible forms. Select your disability type and preferences.
index.step2Desc: Our AI extracts your skills automatically using OCR and NLP technology.
index.step3Desc: Our matching engine finds jobs based on your abilities, not limitations.
index.step4Desc: Connect with inclusive employers who value your unique talents.
index.stat1: of the world's population lives with a disability
index.stat2: unemployment rate for people with disabilities in some countries
index.stat3: of jobs on InclusiveHire are accessibility-verified
index.platformFeaturesDesc: Every feature is designed with accessibility and inclusion at its foundation.
index.inclusionDesc: Every person deserves equal access to opportunities.
index.privacyDesc: Your disability data is protected and only shared with consent.
index.abilityFirstDesc: We match based on what you CAN do, not what you can't.
index.ctaDesc: Join thousands of candidates and employers building a more inclusive workforce.
index.gettingStartedDesc: Getting started is simple and fully accessible.

candidatePortal.title: Candidate Portal
candidatePortal.heroDesc: Create an accessible profile, upload your CV, and let our AI match you with inclusive employers who value what you bring.
candidatePortal.welcomeDesc: Track your applications and discover new job opportunities matched to your abilities.
candidatePortal.noApplicationsDesc: Start applying to jobs that match your abilities!
candidatePortal.noJobsAvailable: No jobs available right now. Check back soon!
candidatePortal.feature1Desc: Fully accessible sign-up with screen reader support, voice input, and simplified forms.
candidatePortal.feature2Desc: Choose your disability type to receive tailored accommodations and job matches.
candidatePortal.feature3Desc: Upload your CV in any format. Our AI extracts skills using OCR and NLP technology.
candidatePortal.feature4Desc: Get an auto-generated professional profile highlighting your strengths and abilities.
candidatePortal.feature5Desc: Receive personalized job matches based on your abilities, not limitations.
candidatePortal.feature6Desc: Set your workplace accommodation needs to find the perfect fit.

employerPortal.title: Employer Portal
employerPortal.heroDesc: Post inclusive job listings, define accommodations, and discover pre-matched candidates through AI-powered compatibility scoring.
employerPortal.welcomeDesc: Manage your job postings and review matched candidates from your dashboard.
employerPortal.signInToView: Sign in to view your matches
employerPortal.signInToViewDesc: Create an employer account to access real candidate data.
employerPortal.noApplicantsDesc: Post a job to start receiving applications.
employerPortal.feature1Desc: Define job roles with detailed physical and cognitive requirement specifications.
employerPortal.feature2Desc: Specify exact physical demands so our AI can match candidates with the right abilities.
employerPortal.feature3Desc: Get a 0-100% compatibility score for each candidate based on ability-based matching.
employerPortal.feature4Desc: View, filter, and connect with pre-matched candidates ranked by compatibility.

employerDashboard.title: Employer Dashboard
employerDashboard.noJobsDesc: Post a job to start receiving applications.
employerDashboard.noApplicationsYet: No applications yet for this job.

about.title: About InclusiveHire
about.missionDesc: To create a more inclusive employment landscape by connecting talented individuals with disabilities to employers who value their contributions.
about.visionDesc: A world where disability is not a barrier to employment, and where talent is recognized based on abilities, not limitations.

about.candidateHeroDesc: InclusiveHire is built for you — every feature is designed to remove barriers and connect your abilities with the right opportunities.
about.corporateHeroDesc: InclusiveHire gives your company the tools to find, evaluate, and hire qualified candidates with disabilities — fairly and efficiently.
about.guestHeroDesc: We're building the future of inclusive employment—where every person's abilities are recognized, valued, and matched with the right opportunities.
about.candidateStep1Desc: Register with an accessible form. Select your disability type and set your accommodation preferences.
about.candidateStep2Desc: Our AI reads your CV using OCR and NLP to extract your skills, experience, and qualifications automatically.
about.candidateStep3Desc: Our matching engine compares your abilities with job requirements and gives you a 0–100% compatibility score.
about.candidateStep4Desc: Apply to jobs that fit your abilities. Employers are notified instantly and can review your profile.
about.candidateStep5Desc: Monitor the status of every application — submitted, accepted, or rejected — all from your portal.
about.candidateStep6Desc: Every job listing includes accommodation details so you know exactly what support you'll receive.
about.candidateValue1Desc: We match you based on what you CAN do, not your limitations.
about.candidateValue2Desc: Your disability information is private and only shared with your consent.
about.candidateValue3Desc: Screen reader support, keyboard navigation, high contrast mode — built in from day one.
about.corporateStep1Desc: Create an employer account with your company details, industry, and contact information.
about.corporateStep2Desc: Define job requirements, physical needs, and the accommodations your workplace provides.
about.corporateStep3Desc: Our engine automatically scores every applicant with a 0–100% compatibility rating based on ability matching.
about.corporateStep4Desc: See all applicants ranked by compatibility score. Review profiles, CVs, and accommodation needs.
about.corporateStep5Desc: Make hiring decisions directly from the dashboard. Candidates are notified automatically.
about.corporateStep6Desc: Track your hiring diversity and build a reputation as an inclusive employer.
about.corporateValue1Desc: AI compatibility scores remove unconscious bias and surface the best-fit candidates.
about.corporateValue2Desc: Structured accommodation fields help you meet accessibility and employment regulations.
about.corporateValue3Desc: Access a pool of highly motivated candidates that traditional platforms overlook.
about.arch1Desc: Accessible, responsive UI with ARIA labels, keyboard navigation, and high contrast support.
about.arch2Desc: Scalable serverless backend with authentication, database, and edge functions.
about.arch3Desc: Relational schema linking candidates, employers, jobs, skills, and accommodations.
about.phase1Desc: Core portals, accessible registration, database schema for Users, Jobs, and Skills.
about.phase2Desc: Ability-based matching engine with 0-100% compatibility scoring and accommodation suggestions.
about.phase3Desc: CV upload with Tesseract/Google Vision OCR and NLP skill extraction.
about.phase4Desc: Text-to-Speech for blind support and Speech-to-Text for deaf support.
about.phase5Desc: Advanced matching algorithms, predictive analytics, and personalized recommendations.
about.future1Desc: Integration with government databases for streamlined disability verification.
about.future2Desc: Employer certification program for accessibility and inclusion standards.
about.future3Desc: AI-powered sign language translation through animated avatars.
about.future4Desc: Practice interviews with AI that adapts to your communication needs.

accessibilityPage.heroDesc: Every pixel, every interaction, every feature is built with accessibility at its foundation. We don't retrofit — we design inclusively from day one.
accessibilityPage.feature1Desc: Toggle high contrast for improved visibility. All colors meet WCAG AAA standards.
accessibilityPage.feature2Desc: Every interactive element has proper ARIA labels and roles for full screen reader compatibility.
accessibilityPage.feature3Desc: Complete keyboard navigation with visible focus indicators. Tab through every feature without a mouse.
accessibilityPage.feature4Desc: Navigate and interact with the platform using voice commands for hands-free access.
accessibilityPage.feature5Desc: All video content includes accurate captions and subtitles in multiple languages.
accessibilityPage.feature6Desc: Built-in screen reading for blind and low-vision users. Hear any content read aloud.
accessibilityPage.feature7Desc: Dictate messages, fill forms, and search jobs using voice input for deaf and motor-impaired users.
accessibilityPage.feature8Desc: Optimized for all screen sizes, zoom levels up to 400%, and assistive technology displays.
